title: Pachyanthus corymbifer
taxonomy: Pachyanthus corymbifer is classified within the family Melastomataceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the melastome family. This classification places Pachyanthus corymbifer within the larger taxonomic hierarchy of plant classification.
uses: Pachyanthus corymbifer has been reported to have various medicinal properties, but specific information about its medicinal uses is limited.
